overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character walking along a coastal stone path at sunset through the Kuta Grasslands. The character transitions from the path into a field of tall white grass as the lighting shifts from golden hour to dusk, with distant smoke plumes visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path through tall grass

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along the stone path toward the setting sun, sword visible on back

entered.detail: cobblestone trail winding through the grass with wet reflective stones
tall green grass swaying in the wind along the left side of the path
tall green grass swaying in the wind along the right side of the path
calm sea visible beyond the cliff edge to the left
bright sun low on the horizon creating strong lens flare and long shadows
traditional wooden post structure on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a cobblestone path through dense tall grass on a coastal cliff. The sun sits low on the horizon ahead, creating a warm backlit atmosphere with lens flare. The ocean is visible to the left while the path winds forward through the swaying grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland field with distant smoke plumes

events.description: character turns right off the stone path into the deep white grass field
ambient light drops significantly as sun sets below horizon, transitioning to blue hour dusk

agents.ego_description: character turns off the path and walks through the tall white grass toward distant smoke plumes on the horizon

entered.detail: field of tall white pampas grass swaying in the wind, parting as the character walks through
thick black smoke rising from multiple fires in the distant landscape
dense line of trees forming the horizon boundary
large rocky hill formation visible through the grass

segments.scene_description: The character turns off the stone path and enters a field of tall white grass. The lighting shifts to dusk as the sun sets, revealing dark smoke plumes rising in the distance. The character continues walking through the swaying grass toward a distant forest and rocky outcrops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that transitions from a sun-drenched stone path into a vast, darkening field of white grass. It begins with a samurai walking along a cobblestone path, where the low sun creates a warm, backlit atmosphere with lens flare against the backdrop of the ocean. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts when they turn off the stone path and enter a dense expanse of swaying white grass. The lighting then fades from golden hour to the muted tones of dusk, revealing dark smoke plumes rising on the horizon. The camera continues to follow the character through the grass, finally heading toward distant rocky outcrops and a dark forest.
